general_summary: Mobile app connecting urban dog owners with neighborhood dog walkers. Targets busy professionals 25-40 who need trusted, affordable booking, real-time tracking, and secure payments.
raw_idea_hash: I want to build a mobile app that helps dog owners find reliable dog walkers in their neighborhood. The problem is that busy pro

answered_context.target_user: Urban dog owners aged 25-40 working full-time
answered_context.core_problem: Busy professionals struggle to find trusted dog walkers quickly and affordably
answered_context.solution_shape: Mobile app for booking, tracking, and paying dog walkers
answered_context.business_goal: Capture 10% of local dog walking market within 6 months
answered_context.why_now: Post-pandemic pet ownership surge and return to office
answered_context.primary_metric: Reduce average booking time from 2 days to 10 minutes
functional_requirements: Search and filter walkers by availability and rating
Push notifications for booking confirmations and walk updates
constraints: Must comply with local pet insurance regulations
risks: Walker supply shortage during peak hours
